headline: Uber Technologies (UBER) Adds New Retailers to Uber Eats Marketplace
summary: Uber Technologies, Inc. (NYSE:UBER) is one of the 12 Most Profitable S&P 500 Stocks to Invest In. On June 24, 2026, Uber Technologies, Inc. (NYSE:UBER) announced the addition of several retailers to the Uber Eats marketplace, expanding the retail products available for on-demand delivery.
